name: Jamba2 Mini
archDisplay: SSM-Transformer hybrid (Mamba + Transformer) Mixture-of-Experts, 52B total / 12B active
note: Newest Jamba generation (successor to Jamba 1.5 Large/Mini already in corpus, dated 2024-08-22), built for enterprise RAG/grounding reliability. Released alongside a 3B dense sibling.

results.notes: Read directly off the same chart (value 0.97). Note this is 1pt above the taxonomy's stated ifeval range ceiling of 96 -- flagging in case that range needs updating, but the number as published by AI21 is 0.97.
Read directly off the same chart's FACTS grounding bar (value 0.57), which matches the taxonomy's facts-grounding benchmark description (faithfulness to a provided context document).

verificationNotes: AI21's own announcement only describes 'category leader' qualitative rankings on IFBench/IFEval/Collie/FACTS without exact numeric scores, and a human-eval win vs Ministral 3 14B without a percentage; no results entry included to avoid guessing a number.
